command: cd /workspace && test -f index.html && grep -q '<body' index.html && grep -q '</body>' index.html && test $(wc -c < index.html) -gt 1000 && python3 -c "import os,re; h=open('index.html').read(); refs=[m[0] for m in re.findall(r'(?:href|src)=[\"\x27]([^\x27>\s]+)[\"\x27]',h)]; missing=[r for r in refs if not r.startswith(('http://','https://','data:','mailto:','#')) and not os.path.isfile(r)]; exit(1) if missing else print('OK')"
rationale: Confirms index.html exists, contains structural body tags, exceeds 1KB for substantive content, and programmatically verifies that any local href/src references resolve to actual files in the workspace.

command: cd /workspace && grep -qi 'name="viewport"' index.html && cat index.html style.css | grep -qE '@media|clamp\(|min\(|max\('
rationale: Verifies the mandatory viewport meta tag is present and confirms at least one genuine responsive CSS mechanism (media query or fluid sizing function) exists in the project files.
Verifies that neither style.css nor index.html contains outline suppression (outline: none or outline: 0), ensuring keyboard focus indicators remain visible per accessibility requirements.

command: cd /workspace && python3 -c "import re,os;c=''.join(open(f).read() for f in ['index.html','style.css'] if os.path.exists(f)); ha=bool(re.search(r'(@keyframes|animation\s*:|transition\s*:)',c,re.I)); hr=bool(re.search(r'@media\s*\(\s*prefers-reduced-motion\s*:\s*reduce\s*\)',c,re.I)); assert not(ha and not hr),'Missing prefers-reduced-motion'; print('PASS')"
rationale: Reads index.html and style.css, detects any CSS @keyframes, animation:, or transition: declarations. If motion is present, asserts that a @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) block exists to ensure accessibility compliance. Exits non-zero if motion is used without the required media query.

command: cd /workspace && grep -oiE "font-family:\s*['\"]?([^;'\"]}]+)" index.html style.css | grep -viE "^\s*(sans-serif|serif|monospace|system-ui)\s*$" | sort -u | wc -l | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
rationale: Extracts all font-family declarations from the project files, filters out generic fallbacks, counts the remaining unique custom families, and asserts the count is at least two.

command: cd /workspace && test -s index.html && ! grep -qiE 'lorem ipsum|placeholder text|your text here|todo|heading 1|subtitle here' index.html
rationale: Ensures the final HTML document contains no generic placeholder or boilerplate text, verifying all visible content was custom-written for the underground music event brief.

command: cd /workspace && test -f index.html && test -f style.css && ! grep -qiE '#F4F1EA|#F5F1E9|#EFEAE0|#C45A3B|#B5503A|#D2691E' index.html style.css
rationale: Ensures the generated HTML/CSS does not contain the AI-default cream/terracotta hex codes (#F4F1EA, #F5F1E9, #EFEAE0, #C45A3B, #B5503A, #D2691E), verifying the design avoids the warned-about template palette.
Ensures the agent did not execute destructive filesystem or repository-altering commands during the design build process.
